data.description: US FEDERAL BUDGET DEFICIT NARROWS TO $145B (PREV $173B)
U.S. FISCAL 2026 YEAR-TO-DATE DEFICIT $602B VS $711B IN FISCAL 2025; DECEMBER DEFICIT $145B VS $87B IN DEC 2024, WITH RECORD OUTLAYS $629B AND RECEIPTS $484B; NET CUSTOMS RECEIPTS $27.89B – TREASURY.

data.title: The Little Gym ranks #125 on Entrepreneur's Franchise 500 list for innovation and expansion in 2025.
data.description: A renowned children's enrichment and physical development center has been acknowledged after a year of growth, creativity, and a notable increase in involvement. Based in Dallas, The Little Gym stands as the top destination globally for enhancing the development of children aged four months and above.

data.title: Freed-Hardeman University to host 90th Annual Bible Lectureship on Feb 1-5, attracting participants nationwide.
data.description: Freed-Hardeman University in Henderson, Tenn. will be hosting its Annual Bible Lectureship for the 90th year in a row from Feb. 1-5, 2026. The event will bring together Christians, church leaders, and Bible students from around the country. Registration is available to the public at no cost.

data.title: Visa, Mastercard stocks drop as JPMorgan opposes Trump's plan to cap credit card rates at 10%.
data.description: JPMorgan's Chief Financial Officer has expressed a readiness to explore all options in response to President Donald Trump's plan to cap credit card interest rates at 10%. Following this statement, shares of Visa and Mastercard declined. JPMorgan has pledged to resist the proposed rate cap.

data.title: Oshkosh integrates autonomy into industrial gear, driving stock to record highs, expanding capabilities beyond battlefield.
data.description: Oshkosh, a manufacturer of industrial equipment, is introducing autonomous technology to construction sites after using it in battlefield machines. This move has led to a significant increase in their stock value, reaching all-time highs. The incorporation of autonomy in their industrial and construction gear is seen as a promising development for the company.

data.title: UBS eyes IBM, Google, and IonQ in quantum computing stocks. Infleqtion set to go public. Wall Street's interest grows.
data.description: UBS is now among the increasing number of financial institutions on Wall Street keeping an eye on quantum computing stocks. The company highlights IBM and Google as noteworthy entities in this sector. The announcement coincides with news of Infleqtion's plan to go public. The move suggests a rising interest in advanced technologies, with UBS specifically eyeing IBM, Google, and IonQ as key players. The developments indicate a growing trend in the investment community towards quantum computing stocks.

data.title: Ademi Firm examines if Sun Country Airlines is securing a fair price for shareholders in a deal with Allegiant Travel.
data.description: In Milwaukee on January 13, 2026, Ademi LLP has initiated an investigation into Sun Country (NASDAQ: SNCY) for potential breaches of fiduciary duty and legal violations regarding its recent deal with Allegiant Travel. Anyone interested in participating in the investigation and seeking more information can click the provided link for details.

data.title: Gulf marks 125th anniversary, celebrating innovation, 125 years of customer partnerships, and industry leadership.
data.description: Framingham, Massachusetts - Gulf is excited to reveal the commemoration of its 125th anniversary, showcasing a legacy of innovation, strong partnerships, and a leading position in the industry. The milestone highlights the brand's long-standing presence, successful customer collaborations, and its esteemed status as one of the most renowned brands in the market.

data.title: Vector Building Products partners with Spectrum Resource to launch premier building products platform, appoints John Krawczyk as CEO.
data.description: Dallas-based Vector Building Products has revealed its entry into the market as a top specialty building products distribution platform. The company's debut includes a key partnership with Spectrum Resource, a prominent distributor with locations in Dallas and Houston, Texas. Established in January 2026, Vector aims to elevate the industry with a focus on quality goods and exceptional service. This announcement sets the stage for a new era in the building products sector, with a strong initial presence in two key Texan cities, boasting a wide reach and strong customer base.

data.title: Boeing shares rise as company reports 600 total deliveries in 2025, with 160 in Q4, 117 from 737 family.
data.description: Boeing Company (NYSE: BA) saw an increase in its shares as it announced its delivery totals for 2025. In the fourth quarter alone, Boeing successfully delivered 160 commercial airplanes, contributing to a total of 600 deliveries for the entire year. The 737 family stood out in the commercial segment, with 117 units delivered during the last quarter. Additionally, Boeing's Defense, Space, and Security division maintained its strength by delivering 37 defense aircraft. This update can be found on Benzinga.com for further information.

data.title: Family Research Council, Senator Graham, and state AGs to lead press conference urging FDA on abortion policies.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, at 1:00 PM ET, Family Research Council President Tony Perkins will participate in a gathering alongside U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham (R-S.C.), the attorneys general from Louisiana and Ohio, and key pro-life lawmakers from both state and national levels. The meeting is set to address important issues related to the pro-life movement and is expected to involve prominent figures in discussing strategies and initiatives.
